hero.description: At 20, I <blue>led the regional champion team at the NASA Space Apps Challenge</blue> and have already impacted 50k+ people. I turn ideas into digital experiences that change thousands of lives.

projects_section.title: FEATURED
projects_section.subtitle: Each project is a real solution for real problems. Here are some of my proudest works.

about_section.label: ABOUT ME
about_section.title: BUILDING
about_section.p1: 20-year-old Full Stack Developer from Brazil. With experience in large-scale projects — like the Fully app from Prudential with R$200M in investment and 100k+ users — and recognition in global competitions like NASA Space Apps Challenge.
about_section.p2: AWS Certified, leader at the Aspire Leaders Program (created by Harvard Business School professors) and with projects that have already impacted over 100 thousand people.

contact_section.availability: Available for freelance projects and remote fullstack positions.

hero.name: VICTOR HUGO
hero.subtitle: Full Stack Developer, led the regional champion team at NASA Space Apps Challenge and currently at Fully impacting 50k+ people's lives
hero.description: At 20, I've earned global recognition as regional champion at NASA Space Apps Challenge, led the 2nd best project in Brazil at the CAPES hackathon, and serve as Domain Leader of Technology in the global leadership program founded by Harvard Business School professors. Every project is an opportunity to build solutions that impact thousands of people.

beyond_section.quote: "At 20, I've already learned that technology isn't just about code — it's about building solutions that transform lives. Every line I write has the potential to impact people around the world."
